# glitchtip_organization_members (Data Source)

Lists all members of a GlitchTip organization. Useful for iterating over existing members (e.g. with `for_each`) without enumerating them by hand.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all members of an organization.
data "glitchtip_organization_members" "all" {
  organization = "acme-inc"
}

output "member_emails" {
  value = [for m in data.glitchtip_organization_members.all.members : m.email]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization whose members are listed.

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) All members of the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the member was invited.
- `email` (String) Email address of the member.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the organization member.
- `is_owner` (Boolean) Whether the member is an owner of the organization.
- `org_role` (String) Organization-level role of the member.
- `pending` (Boolean) Whether the member's invitation is still pending acceptance.
- `role_name` (String) Human-readable name of the member's organization role.
